nasb.text: As when God overthrew Sodom And Gomorrah with its neighbors,” declares the Lord, “No man will live there, Nor will any son of man reside in it.

esv.text: As when God overthrew Sodom and Gomorrah and their neighboring cities, declares the Lord, so no man shall dwell there, and no son of man shall sojourn in her.

cnv.text: 就像　神傾覆的所多瑪、蛾摩拉， 和它們鄰近的城鎮一樣； 必沒有人住在那裡， 也必沒有人在那裡寄居。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 上帝要毁灭巴比伦，像毁灭所多玛、蛾摩拉及其周围的城邑一样，使那里人烟绝迹。这是耶和华说的。
